title: Black cobweb outline
description: A simple Minecraft resource pack that replaces cobwebs with a clean black outline for better visibility and a sleek, minimal look.
body:
Black Cobweb Outline is a custom Minecraft resource pack that redesigns cobwebs with a clean black outline. Instead of the default texture, cobwebs now feature a darker, more defined look that improves visibility while keeping a simple and stylish aesthetic.

This pack is perfect for PvP, parkour, or survival gameplay where clear visuals matter. The black outline helps cobwebs stand out in any environment without being distracting.

Designed to be lightweight and performance-friendly, Black Cobweb Outline works well on its own or combined with other resource packs. It enhances your game visually without changing any core mechanics.
